name: ARM Cortex-A8
notableFeature: First ARMv7 out-of-order core; launched the smartphone performance era

name: Apple A4
notableFeature: Apple's first custom SoC; powered iPhone 4 and original iPad

name: Qualcomm Snapdragon S1 MSM7227
notableFeature: Qualcomm's first Snapdragon; integrated 3G modem on-die

name: Samsung Hummingbird
notableFeature: PowerVR SGX540 GPU delivered 2× the fillrate of contemporaries; used in Galaxy S

name: Texas Instruments OMAP3430
notableFeature: Heterogeneous compute ahead of its time; used in Nokia N900

name: Nvidia Tegra 1
notableFeature: Nvidia's first mobile SoC; emphasized GPU-class graphics for media tablets
